statement: In every magma, Equation 1708 (`x = (y * x) * ((z * y) * w)`) implies Equation 3230 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * x) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0765
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op z y) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) x) w)
